data.title: Goldman Sachs Report Highlights Investor Optimism Amid Geopolitical Risks
data.description: A Goldman Sachs report indicates that despite rising geopolitical risks, investor risk appetite remains high. According to ChainCatcher, the market appears to have adequately absorbed macroeconomic risks, with investor optimism currently at approximately the 67th percentile. The proprietary risk appetite index has reached its highest level since April 2021. Funds are increasingly flowing into high-risk assets, with a positive stance on stock allocations. Additionally, international funds are accelerating their inflow into Europe, Japan, and emerging markets.

data.title: Moltbot's Sudden Rise: A Personal Project Turns Into a Digital Phenomenon
data.description:
PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) about the unexpected popularity of Moltbot, previously known as Clawdbot, which has captured widespread attention recently. The founder, @steipete, revealed in a conversation with @tbpn that the project was not a team effort but rather a personal endeavor born out of burnout. He described the AI agent not merely as software but as a 'digital life form' capable of understanding, acting, and using a computer as its body.

Following its viral success, the project faced a surge of security emails, an overwhelmed Discord server, and a request from Anthropic to change its name. The renaming process was even disrupted by script bots attempting to hijack the account, adding to the drama.

The detailed conversation provides a comprehensive overview of Moltbot's journey and explores why AI agents have suddenly become a central narrative in technology discussions.

data.title: Tether's Strategic Expansion in Gold Market Amid Geopolitical Shifts
data.description:
Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino has indicated that the company's role in the gold market is set to expand as geopolitical rivals of the United States may introduce a gold-backed alternative to the dollar. According to Odaily, Ardoino highlighted Tether's ongoing strategy to reinvest substantial company profits into gold assets, maintaining a weekly purchase rate of 1 to 2 tons of gold, with plans to continue this approach in the coming months.

Ardoino disclosed that Tether currently holds nearly 140 tons of gold, stored in a nuclear bunker in Switzerland built during the Cold War. This reserve is one of the largest known single gold holdings globally, outside of central banks, ETFs, and commercial banks. With recent increases in the prices of gold and other precious metals, the value of Tether's gold holdings has surpassed $23.3 billion.

Furthermore, Ardoino mentioned that Tether is assessing market conditions and trading strategies, aiming to capture arbitrage opportunities through more active gold trading. The company has recently hired two experienced gold traders from HSBC to advance its physical gold market operations.

data.title: Ripple Treasury Platform Launched to Enhance Corporate Cash Management
data.description: Ripple's subsidiary, GTreasury, has introduced the Ripple Treasury platform to modernize cash and liquidity management for businesses. According to PANews, the platform integrates traditional treasury functions with enterprise-level digital asset infrastructure. It utilizes AI predictive analytics, real-time reconciliation, and global liquidity management to streamline financial operations for corporate teams. Ripple Treasury offers 24/7 cross-border payments, institutional custody, and dual management of fiat and digital assets. The platform aims to eliminate the need for pre-funded accounts, reduce foreign exchange costs, and unlock working capital for global enterprises.

data.title: Binance Offers P2P Ad Bidding Fee Discounts for African Merchants
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is launching a P2P Featured Ad Bidding Fee Discount campaign specifically for P2P merchants in Africa. This initiative aims to provide bidding fee discounts during the campaign period, which spans from 2026-01-28 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-02-25 23:59 (UTC). Merchants can participate by logging into the Binance P2P Merchant Portal, selecting their preferred fiat currency, and placing a bid to automatically receive the fee discount.

The fee discount structure is designed to benefit both first-time and existing bidders. First-time bidders, defined as users who have never completed a successful bidding order before 2026-01-28 00:00 (UTC), will receive a 30% discount on their entire bid submission. For instance, if a user submits a bid for six hours and their bids are successful, they will enjoy a 30% discount on all winning bids for that submission. Existing bidders, whose last successful bid was more than six months ago, will receive a 20% discount on their entire bid submission under similar conditions.

The discount will automatically apply to each submission, and all winning bids within the same submission will receive the discount. Users are encouraged to familiarize themselves with the bidding process by watching the available video tutorial in English. They can track their first winning bid and attempt multiple discounted bids in a cycle until they win. All bids must comply with Binance’s P2P terms and policies. This promotion is applicable to verified P2P merchants in Africa who have received official notifications via app push, inmail, or email. Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants involved in dishonest behavior or tampering with program code.

data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net inflow of $1.87 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the Solana spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $1.87 million yesterday (January 27th, Eastern Time). Only the Fidelity SOL ETF (FSOL) saw a net inflow yesterday (January 27th, Eastern Time), with a single-day net inflow of $2.99 ​​million and a historical total net inflow of $151 million. The Grayscale SOL ETF (GSOL) saw a single-day net outflow of $1.12 million, with a historical total net inflow of $119 million. As of press time, the Solana spot ETF has a total net asset value of $1.08 billion, a net asset value ratio of 1.50%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $878 million.

data.title: South Korea's Democratic Party Deliberates Digital Asset Legislation
data.description: South Korea's ruling Democratic Party is still in discussions regarding crucial elements of its Digital Asset Basic Act. According to NS3.AI, the party is focusing on issues such as stablecoin issuance and shareholder restrictions. Key contentious points include proposals to limit the issuance of won-denominated stablecoins to consortiums led by banks and to cap the stakes of major shareholders in cryptocurrency exchanges. The Democratic Party plans to finalize and present the bill following further deliberations, aiming for completion before the Lunar New Year holiday.

data.title: Tether plans to buy 1–2 tons of gold per week in the coming months and actively seek arbitrage opportunities through trading.
data.description: In an interview with Bloomberg, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino stated that Tether's role in the gold market is expected to expand further as U.S. geopolitical adversaries may introduce gold-backed alternatives to the dollar. Ardoino pointed out that Tether plans to continue reinvesting its substantial earnings into gold assets, currently purchasing 1 to 2 tons of gold per week, and expects to continue this strategy in the coming months. He revealed that Tether currently holds nearly 140 tons of gold, stored in a Cold War-era nuclear bunker in Switzerland, making it one of the largest known single gold reserves globally, excluding central banks, ETFs, and commercial banks. With the recent rise in gold and other precious metal prices, Tether's gold holdings are now worth over $23.3 billion. Furthermore, Ardoino stated that Tether is assessing relevant market conditions and trading strategies, planning to capture arbitrage opportunities through more proactive gold trading. The company recently hired two senior gold traders formerly with HSBC to advance its physical gold market strategy. (The Block)

data.title: The ERC-8004 trustless AI Agent standard may launch on the Ethereum mainnet this Thursday.
data.description: ERC-8004, a smart contract standard for enabling trustless AI agent communication on Ethereum, is expected to be officially deployed to the Ethereum mainnet this Thursday. Marco De Rossi, head of MetaMask AI, stated in a developer Telegram group that further development of ERC-8004 has been "frozen," with a mainnet launch planned for mid-week (likely Thursday at 9 AM ET). The official Ethereum X account subsequently confirmed that the protocol will be launched on the mainnet "soon." ERC-8004 (Ethereum Request for Comment) proposes a standardized method for registering and verifying AI agents on-chain, allowing developers to directly integrate them into smart contracts without upgrading the Ethereum network itself. This standard aims to address two core issues in the AI ​​agent economy: how to discover AI agents in an open environment and how to determine their trustworthiness. By introducing portable reputation and discovery mechanisms, ERC-8004 allows AI agents across organizations to interact without prior trust, thus supporting an open agent economy. Davide Crapis, head of AI at the Ethereum Foundation, stated that Ethereum possesses the unique platform characteristics to "secure and settle AI-to-AI interactions." Developers also revealed that the standard will support Ethereum Layer 2 networks such as Base in the future. With the release of ERC-8004, AI agents are expected to evolve from isolated tools into on-chain participants with autonomous economic behavior, laying the foundation for a decentralized AI services market. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Notion Completes $270 Million Private Equity Deal Valued at $11 Billion
data.description:
Notion has announced the completion of a private equity tender offer totaling approximately $270 million, valuing the company at $11 billion. According to PANews, the transaction involved new investor Singapore's sovereign wealth fund GIC, along with existing investors Sequoia Capital and Index Ventures, who acquired shares directly from current and former employees.

The company stated that the acquisition aims to provide financial liquidity for employees, supporting their long-term development and life planning. To facilitate this, Notion has removed the one-year vesting period for employee options, allowing nearly all employees to participate.

In 2025, Notion experienced accelerated growth due to the adoption of AI features, with over 50% of its annual recurring revenue by year-end coming from AI clients, a figure that doubled over the past year. Recently, the company opened an office in Singapore to support its rapid expansion in the Asia-Pacific region.

data.title: BitMine Increases Ethereum Stake with Additional 113,280 ETH
data.description: On January 28, BitMine has increased its Ethereum holdings by staking an additional 113,280 ETH. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, this move adds to their already substantial stake. BitMine has now staked a total of 2,265,984 ETH. This significant investment underscores their commitment to Ethereum and its potential in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Manus AI Integrates Anthropic's Agent Skills Open Standard
data.description: Manus AI has announced the integration of Anthropic's Agent Skills open standard. According to Foresight News, Agent Skills is an innovative approach that packages expertise, workflows, and best practices into reusable, file system-based resources. Manus stated that within the Manus AI ecosystem, Skill and MCP (Model Context Protocol) are two technologies with different objectives but complementary capabilities.

data.title: A whale with 5x leverage went long on HYPE and made a floating profit of $13.03 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, HYPE rose from $22 to $33 in the past day. Whale Laurent Zeimes (0x8def...2dae) opened a long position of 1.227 million HYPE tokens with 5x leverage when HYPE was at a low of $22.37, with a position valued at $27.46 million. With the price of HYPE reaching $33, this long position is currently showing a profit of $13.03 million.

data.title: Citi Bank Forecasts Significant Increase in Silver Prices
data.description: Citi Bank has projected that silver prices could rise significantly, reaching $150 per ounce by the end of this year. This prediction comes amid growing interest in precious metals as investors seek safe-haven assets in uncertain economic times. Crypto Rover posted on X, highlighting the bank's optimistic outlook for silver, which is currently trading at much lower levels. The forecast suggests a potential surge in demand driven by factors such as inflation concerns and geopolitical tensions, which could contribute to the upward trend in silver prices. Investors and market analysts are closely monitoring these developments, as they could have substantial implications for the commodities market.

data.title: Binance Launches Promotions with 27,500 USDC in Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is introducing two exclusive promotions aimed at enhancing user engagement with Binance Convert. The promotions, which run from 2026-01-28 00:00 (UTC) to 2026-02-24 23:59 (UTC), offer a total of 27,500 USDC in token vouchers to eligible participants.

**Promotion A: Accumulate BTC and Share 25,000 USDC**

During the promotion period, users who register via the landing page and accumulate Bitcoin through Binance Convert can participate in Promotion A. Each week, the top 500 users with the highest BTC accumulation will share a reward pool of 5,000 USDC, with a cap of 10 USDC per user. Additionally, a bonus task allows winners from weeks 1 to 4, who trade BTC token pairs on at least 14 different days via Convert Recurring, to share an extra 5,000 USDC, also capped at 10 USDC per user.

**Promotion B: First Trade Rewards**

Promotion B targets new Binance Convert users who have not previously used the Convert Recurring feature. The first 500 eligible users who convert at least 25 USDC equivalent of any tokens within the first seven days after their initial deposit will share a 2,500 USDC reward pool, capped at 5 USDC per user.

Participants must register their participation and complete the relevant trades during the promotion period to qualify for rewards. Trades executed outside the specified period or through certain methods, such as API trades or stablecoin conversions, will not count. Binance reserves the right to disqualify any participants engaging in prohibited activities, such as wash trading or market manipulation. Rewards will be distributed within two weeks after the promotion ends, and users must claim their vouchers within 60 days of distribution.

data.title: Ethereum Wallets Reach Record High Amid Staking Interest
data.description: Santiment posted on X that the number of non-empty Ethereum wallets has surged to over 175.5 million, marking a record among all cryptocurrencies. This increase comes as staking remains a popular activity, particularly during periods of market stagnation. Consequently, the supply of Ethereum on exchanges is expected to decrease as more users engage in staking activities.

data.title: Rodeo, a social NFT platform, has announced its closure, becoming the second NFT platform to shut down within a week.
data.description: Social NFT platform Rodeo has announced its closure, becoming the second NFT platform to do so this week. Rodeo CEO and co-founder Kayvon Tehranian stated that despite positive feedback from its core community, the platform failed to achieve the scale required for sustainability, making continued operation unfeasible. Launched on iOS in March 2025, Rodeo focused on a social NFT collecting experience, emphasizing rewards for content creation rather than simple trading. The platform will maintain normal functionality from January 27th to February 10th, then enter read-only mode, and will completely shut down on March 10th. The platform will assist users in migrating their assets and data to Arweave and provide guidance on contract asset migration. Additionally, Tehranian announced that ownership of his NFT art platform, Foundation, will be transferred to Blackdove. At the market level, the NFT industry has been sluggish since its peak in 2022, with monthly Ethereum NFT transaction volume falling from nearly $5 billion at the beginning of 2022 to approximately $159 million in January 2026. Meanwhile, Nifty Gateway has updated its shutdown plan, extending the user asset migration deadline to April 23.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $9.16 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, XRP spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $9.16 million yesterday (January 27th, Eastern Time). The XRP spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday (January 27th, Eastern Time) was the Bitwise XRP ETF (XRP), with a single-day net inflow of $7.08 million and a historical total net inflow of $332 million. This was followed by the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ), with a single-day net inflow of $2.08 million and a historical total net inflow of $296 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs was $1.38 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.18%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.25 billion.

data.title: USD1: A Political Drama Unfolds
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). USD1 is no longer just a stablecoin story; it has evolved into a political theater. The developments surrounding USD1, including surpassing PYUSD, Binance pulling liquidity, the involvement of Pakistan's central bank, and the application for an OCC license, all point to it being a digital dollar project associated with the Trump family. Its future trajectory depends on the occupant of the White House.

data.title: South Korea to Mandate Cryptocurrency Disclosure for Homebuyers in Regulated Areas
data.description: South Korea is set to implement a new regulation requiring homebuyers in specific regulated regions, including Seoul, to disclose proceeds from cryptocurrency sales when submitting capital procurement plans. According to NS3.AI, the Korea Real Estate Board is in the process of finalizing system updates to enforce this requirement. The amendment to the Transaction Reporting Act is awaiting Cabinet approval and will be enforced immediately upon approval, with no grace period provided.
